name: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity-Indexed Trust
summary: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity-Indexed Trust (GSG) is a Delaware statutory trust that issues shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in its net assets. The Trust holds long positions in exchange-traded index futures contracts on the S&P GSCI Excess Return Index, along with cash and U.S. Treasury securities as collateral, seeking to track the S&P GSCI Total Return Index before fees and expenses.

products.name: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity-Indexed Trust Shares
products.description: Exchange-traded shares representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in a commodity futures index trust, traded on NYSE Arca, providing exposure to the S&P GSCI Total Return Index.

partnerships.description: Serves as Trustee of the Trust, an affiliate of the Sponsor iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC.
Serves as commodity trading advisor for the Trust, authorized to transact in Index Futures and Collateral Assets.

partnerships.partner_name: State Street Bank and Trust Company
partnerships.description: Serves as Trust Administrator, handling certain day-to-day administrative functions delegated by the Trustee.
Serves as the clearing futures commission merchant (Clearing FCM) for the Trust's Index Futures positions.
Index Sponsor that maintains the S&P GSCI Total Return Index and S&P GSCI Excess Return Index tracked by the Trust.
Owns and operates the Chicago Mercantile Exchange where the Trust's Index Futures are listed for trading.
Serves as the Delaware Trustee of the Trust.
